message:
feat(calibrate): add score bucket breakdown and systematic bias sections to markdown report

Enhance CalibrationReport::to_markdown() with two new sections:
- Calibration by Score Bucket: predicted vs actual rates per decile bin
- Systematic Biases Detected: per-process-type directional bias with
  significance filtering

Also update README shadow report example with the -f md flag variant.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -133,6 +133,7 @@ pt shadow status                        # Check observer status
 pt shadow stop                          # Stop observer
 pt shadow export --format=json > shadow_data.json
 pt shadow report --threshold 0.5 --output shadow_report.json
+pt shadow report -f md --threshold 0.5  # ASCII calibration report + curve
 ```
 
 ---
